title: Adventurous Crispy Herb Skewers
description: These adventurous pescatarian-friendly skewers are infused with honey and spices for a crispy and aromatic twist, perfect as an appetizer or light meal.

ingredients.name: 1 pound mixed vegetables (zucchini, bell peppers, onions), thinly sliced
ingredients.notes: Choose firm vegetables to hold together on skewers.

ingredients.name: 25 shrimp tails, peeled and deveined
ingredients.notes: Ensure they are raw but fully cooked for safety.

instructions: Prepare a skewer by threading the vegetables and shrimp onto it.
In a mixing bowl, combine lemon juice, minced garlic, honey, lemon juice, cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper. Stir until well combined.
Marinate the prepared skewers for at least 15 minutes.
Heat a grill or grill pan over medium-high heat. Grill the skewers for about 6-8 minutes per side, basting with marinade during the last few minutes of cooking to ensure it adheres to the skewers.
